tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: While cleaning the garage, I _______ across my old school uniform.
She had to _______ down the job offer because the salary was too low.
We need to _______ up with a solution before Friday.
The meeting has been _______ off until next Monday.
I can't _______ out what this word means.
Please _______ after your little sister while I'm away.
He _______ up playing football when he injured his knee.
The plane _______ off twenty minutes late due to fog.
I'm really _______ forward to the summer holidays.
She _______ into an old friend at the shopping centre.
